title: Legend Twist Gives Consumers An Unforgettable Night At Trace Live With D’banj and Alte Culture Festival - FinancialEDGE
description: Legend Twist pulled out all the stops at Trace Live with D'banj, commemorating his two-decade journey as a stage icon. html:
Legend Twist pulled out all the stops at Trace Live with D’banj, commemorating his two-decade journey as a stage icon. The electrifying event, held on April 12, 2024, at Terra Kulture, delivered an unforgettable experience.

 

Guests arrived dressed to impress, brimming with excitement as they sampled Legend Twist’s trio of flavors – Lemon, Ginger, and Pineapple – and soaked in the vibrant atmosphere.

 

As the lights dimmed, signaling the start of the show, the crowd erupted in cheers as D’Banj took the stage. The music legend treated fans to a setlist packed with classics like “Why Me,” “Fall in Love,” “Endowed,” “Oliver Twist,” and “Mobolowowon.” Other artists like Nasboi and Reekado Banks also performed hit songs like “Umbrella” and “Problem” respectively.

The venue transformed into a massive singalong, with attendees passionately singing along to every word, their enjoyment heightened by the refreshing taste of Legend Twist.

 

Reflecting on the night, Tolu, an avid D’Banj fan, exclaimed, “D’Banj brought the heat! ‘Tongolo’ had everyone grooving, and I paired it with Legend Twist Lemon for that extra kick. The Koko Master truly delivered, and I wouldn’t have missed it for anything.”

Another attendee, Kachi, shared her excitement, saying, “I’ve always admired D’banj and seeing him live was a dream come true. His stage presence is unmatched. A big shoutout to Legend Twist for making this unforgettable night possible. Three amazing flavors and a show to remember. I can’t wait for the next one!”

 

In addition to celebrating Afrobeats excellence with D’banj, the event attracted industry heavyweights such as Larry Gaaga, Masterkraft, Bizzle Osikoya, and Osi Sauve, adding to the evening’s excitement.

 

Not stopping there, Legend Twist continued its support for iconic events by sponsoring the Alte Culture Festival. This festival, known for its celebration of alternative Nigerian music and culture with young Nigerians at the centre, perfectly aligned with Legend Twist’s innovative and refreshing ethos.

At the Alte Culture Festival, attendees enjoyed an immersive experience that blended music, art, and culture. They savored the unique sounds of the Alte music scene while indulging in the three exciting Legend Twist flavors – Lemon, Ginger, and Pineapple.

 

The partnership between Legend Twist and the Alte Culture Festival underscored the brand’s commitment to supporting Nigeria’s vibrant music and cultural scene. By aligning with events that celebrate creativity and individuality, Legend Twist continues to establish itself as a brand that values innovation and originality.

 

If you missed out on these events, don’t worry. Just look out for the next Legend Twist event and follow @legendnigeria for more updates.
